name: 8q12_2_PMP2_TOX_region
description: 8q12.2 region with modest SDs flanking PMP2 (peripheral myelin protein 2) and TOX. Rare CNVs reported. PMP2 paralogs (PMP22 on 17p12, MPZ on 1q23) require cross-chromosome PSV awareness.

architecture.internal_structure: Sparse small SDs in PMP2/TOX vicinity; primary mapping concern is cross-chromosome PMP family PSVs.
